channel.title: GitHub AI Ranking Changes (Top 10)
channel.description: Track changes in GitHub AI repository rankings (Top 10 per category)

item.title: [LLM] everything-claude-code
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 145,211 → 147,301 (+2,090)
The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
Language: JavaScript
Category: LLM Stars: 147,301 | Forks: 22,743

item.title: [Generative AI] aisuite
item.description:
📈 Rank: #10 → #9 (↑1)
Simple, unified interface to multiple Generative AI providers
Language: Python
Category: Generative AI Stars: 13,693 | Forks: 1,445

item.title: [Generative AI] generative-ai
item.description:
📈 Rank: #9 → #8 (↑1)
Sample code and notebooks for Generative AI on Google Cloud, with Gemini on Vertex AI
Language: Jupyter Notebook
Category: Generative AI Stars: 16,573 | Forks: 4,125

item.title: [Generative AI] NeMo
item.description:
📈 Rank: #8 → #7 (↑1)
A scalable generative AI framework built for researchers and developers working on Large Language Models, Multimodal, and Speech AI (Automatic Speech Recognition and Text-to-Speech)
Language: Python
Category: Generative AI Stars: 17,068 | Forks: 3,401

item.title: [Generative AI] GenAI_Agents
item.description:
📈 Rank: #7 → #6 (↑1)
This repository provides tutorials and implementations for various Generative AI Agent techniques, from basic to advanced. It serves as a comprehensive guide for building intelligent, interactive AI systems.
Language: Jupyter Notebook
Category: Generative AI Stars: 21,082 | Forks: 3,519

item.title: [Generative AI] awesome-generative-ai-guide
item.description:
📈 Rank: #6 → #5 (↑1)
A one stop repository for generative AI research updates, interview resources, notebooks and much more!
Language: HTML
Category: Generative AI Stars: 26,008 | Forks: 5,493

item.title: [Generative AI] h2ogpt
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #10 in Generative AI
Private chat with local GPT with document, images, video, etc. 100% private, Apache 2.0. Supports oLLaMa, Mixtral, llama.cpp, and more. Demo: https://gpt.h2o.ai/ https://gpt-docs.h2o.ai/
Language: Python
Category: Generative AI Stars: 11,977 | Forks: 1,319

item.title: [Claude] everything-claude-code
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 145,211 → 147,305 (+2,094)
The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
Language: JavaScript
Category: Claude Stars: 147,305 | Forks: 22,743

item.title: [AI] openclaw
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 351,455 → 352,495 (+1,040)
Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
Language: TypeScript
Category: AI Stars: 352,495 | Forks: 71,055
